name: TOMATO, ONION AND MINT SALAD
servings: serves 4 or more as a side dish
intro: This simple salad (shown on picture 1 and picture 2) makes a perfect side for your summer barbecue.

ingredients.item: tennis ball-size firm tomatoes, thinly sliced
Juice and finely grated zest of 1 lime or lemon
Salt and freshly ground black pepper, to taste

method: Mix all the ingredients together in a bowl and season with salt and black pepper. Allow to sit for 15 minutes before serving.
